programs.title: The Duplicate
programs.desc: When Jessica asks her twin sister Alessandra for help with a blackmailer she gets more than she bargained for.

programs.title: Terror Of Hallow'S Eve
programs.desc: After a fifteen-year-old is brutally beaten up by High School bullies, his wish for revenge unknowingly unleashes the Terror of Halloween.

programs.title: Revenge Of Robert
programs.desc: Infamous killer doll Robert does battle with Hitler's henchmen aboard a train in Nazi Germany.

programs.title: Always And Forever
programs.desc: After a tragedy reunites Nicole with her childhood friends, they each find themselves in danger, targets of a deranged stalker. Nicole knows this can't be a coincidence. The secrets of their past are coming back to haunt them.

programs.title: Born To Race Fast Track
programs.desc: Danny Krueger is a twenty-year old street racer who plays by his own rules. After winning a scholarship to the prestigious Fast Lane Racing Academy, Danny finds himself competing against some of the fiercest young drivers in the world. Tension soars on and off the track, and a terrible incident leaves Danny without a racing partner. Facing dismissal from the academy, Danny is forced to team up with an old rival. The pair must learn to set aside their differences as they vie for rookie spots on a professional racing team.
